title: I CARE Medical Consulting LLP
heading: I CARE
description: Welcome to I CARE Medical Consulting LLP – your trusted healthcare provider. We offer digital X-rays, dental X-rays, 4D sonography, color Doppler, ECG, echocardiography, home blood test, and health checkup plans. Experience advanced medical care with our expert team. Book your appointment today!
